displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III #11
synopsis: Eriadu is under siege! The fate of the planet lies with the ruling Tarkin family, and nobody knows whose side they’re on. Will the Tarkins join forces with the Republic resistance or capitulate to the vile Nihil? While the bureaucrats wheel and deal, Padawan Ram Jomaram gathers a team of underdogs to launch a rescue mission deep within the Occlusion Zone! • Artist Caio Filipe, the illustrator of Lotus Land, joins the High Republic Adventures saga for the first time! • Ongoing series.
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III #11
